name: Chicken and Fresh Vegetable Provencale
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the cauliflower into small pieces.
2. Combine vegetables in a 3-quart baking dish.
3. Sprinkle with 1 T parsley, 2 T basil, and the pepper.
4. Combine the bouillon cube and water and pour over vegetables.
5. Make a paste of 1 T parsley, 1 T basil, garlic powder, and lemon juice.
6. Place the chicken over the vegetables.
7. Spread the paste on the chicken.
8. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours or until the chicken and vegetables are tender, basting occasionally.
